valid_attack.configuration.title: ValidAttack Configs
valid_attack.configuration.interceptClic: Cancel attack clicks when the attack strength bar is not full.
valid_attack.configuration.autoAttackHol: Auto-attack while holding down the attack key and the strength bar is full.
valid_attack.configuration.requireTarget: Only attack when there is a valid living entity target (used by aim assist or crosshair).
valid_attack.configuration.aimAssist.too:
Scan a 120° cone in front of the player and attack the nearest entity.
When enabled together with 'Require Valid Target', the check covers the entire cone instead of only the crosshair line.
